name: EaseUS Todo Backup Home
short_description: EaseUS Todo Backup Home is the data backup software that can backup files & folders, systems, and important data for Windows desktops & Laptops.
detailed_description:
Full-featured Backup Solution

Create backups to prevent fatal data loss and system crash on PC & Laptop. Fast disk/partition clone lets you easily upgrade a small, old or bad hard drive without reinstalling Windows or installed programs and games.
about_the_game:
Full-featured Backup Solution

Create backups to prevent fatal data loss and system crash on PC & Laptop. Fast disk/partition clone lets you easily upgrade a small, old or bad hard drive without reinstalling Windows or installed programs and games.
supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Polish, Thai, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Portuguese - Portugal, Portuguese - Brazil, Korean
